title: Nuclear Age
description: A Mod that aims to add realistic nuclear reactors with functioning radiation and a requirement to get rid of waste.
body:
This is a Mod that aims to add full functional multiblock nuclear reactors based on realistic designs and specifications. Be carefull though because they might go full Chernobyl mode! Radiation is also a thing so be **careful** around anything radioactive.

* This is an alpha build without functioning Reactors
